message:
fix(blob-leases): unify TEST_LOCK to fix flaky tests + expand to 81 (wa-21a7z)

Three test modules (storage, manager, lease) each had their own static
TEST_LOCK but shared a single global STORAGE. Parallel test execution
caused 5-8 random failures per run. Unified into a single crate-level
pub(crate) TEST_LOCK used by all three modules.

Also added 15 tests across content_id, lease_id, error, and storage
modules to bring the default-features count from 66 to 81.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
